hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r FILE; if [[ "$FILE" == *frontend* && ("$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.html) ]]; then (cd frontend && npm run type-check 2>&1 | head -50) || true; fi; }
